description: 11-axis radar viz for an NFR vector vs the project's capacity envelope. Pairs with a sibling <nfr-compass> via data-bind-to; listens for nfr-compass:change and re-renders an inline <svg>.

attributes.name: data-bind-to
attributes.description: ID of a sibling <nfr-compass> to read value from

attributes.name: data-show-envelope
attributes.description: Show the capacity envelope polygon (default true; set to "false" to hide)

events.name: nfr-radar:change
events.description: Fires when the radar re-renders due to a bound compass change or a property write
